# Frequently Asked Questions

**How do I reset my password?**

Open the sign in page and choose the reset link below the password field. Enter the email address on your account and we will send a secure link within a minute or two. The link expires after an hour, so use it promptly. If it does not arrive, check your spam folder before trying again.

**Can I use the service offline?**

Most features need a connection, since your data syncs to the cloud as you work. A few read only views are cached for short trips without signal. Anything you change offline will sync automatically once you reconnect. We do not recommend relying on offline mode for important edits.

**Is my data backed up?**

Yes. We take encrypted snapshots several times a day and keep them for thirty days. If you delete something by accident, contact support and we can usually restore it from a recent snapshot. Your account also keeps a version history for documents, so minor mistakes are easy to undo yourself.

**How do I cancel my subscription?**

Go to the billing section of your account settings and choose cancel. Your plan stays active until the end of the current period, and you will not be charged again. We are sorry to see you go, and your data remains available for export for ninety days after cancellation.

**Do you offer a discount for teams?**

We do. Teams of five or more qualify for tiered pricing, and educational and non profit organisations receive an additional reduction. Get in touch with our sales team — they will put together a quote that fits the size of your group. There is no obligation, and the conversation is always friendly.

**What support do you provide?**

Every plan includes email support with a response within one business day. Paid plans add live chat during working hours, and our largest plan includes a dedicated contact. Our help centre covers the common questions in detail, and most people find their answer there before they ever need to write to us.
